candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total for current assets; directly matches ACT definition.
Balancing line, not the reported total; inferior to exact total.
Non-current assets, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected exact reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; best match for CHE.
Could be a component of cash equivalents, but not as complete as the exact line.
Restricted cash is usually excluded from CHE baseline.

candidates.row_label: Cash and Cash Equivalents at End of Period
candidates.why: Cash-flow statement amount agrees conceptually, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

variables.notes: Preferred balance-sheet cash line over cash-flow ending cash.

candidates.why: Exact reported total current liabilities; directly matches LCT definition.
Only one component of current liabilities, not the total.
Debt component only, not total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected exact reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Clean reported total for current interest-bearing debt; best match for short-term debt and excludes lease liabilities since leases are listed separately.
Possible component of STD, but likely partial and should not be combined with a cleaner total to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of L/T Debt Excluding Financial Lease
candidates.why: Also a valid debt component excluding leases, but likely part of the broader current interest-bearing liabilities total.
Semantically relevant but appears unpopulated in preview; weaker than the clean reported current interest-bearing liabilities total.
Interest payable is not debt principal and should be excluded from STD.

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist because it is the cleanest reported total for current interest-bearing debt. Excludes lease liabilities, which are separately reported as Current lease liabilities.

candidates.why: Direct taxes payable/current tax liability label; exact match for TXP.
Exact balance-sheet PPE line; best match for PPEGT.
Gross PPE exists, but target prefers total/net PPE when available; inferior to exact PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease right-of-use asset gross line, not core PPE total and less preferred.
Not PPE.

variables.notes: R:c. Selected exact PPE line; preferred over gross or lease-specific asset rows.

candidates.why: Exact reported total assets line; directly matches AT definition.
Exact operating cash flow line from cash flow statement; direct match for OANCF.

variables.notes: Exact net cash from operating activities line available.
